name: Company or business entity incorporation (DCIP)
notes: Supported by the Black Book licence record's applicability to formal business organisations. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Formal business entities register with the Department of Companies and Intellectual Property, and private companies file annual returns.
appliesWhen: On formation of a formal business entity, and annually thereafter for the annual return.

name: ZIMRA taxpayer registration
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to individuals, companies, partnerships and cooperatives starting a business. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: New businesses register with ZIMRA through TaRMS within the period stated in ZIMRA's new-trader guidance.

name: VAT registration and returns (ZIMRA)
notes: Applicability and return cadences per the Black Book records; the current registration threshold is deliberately not restated here — confirm with ZIMRA. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Persons trading in taxable supplies who meet the compulsory registration rules register for VAT and file returns for their assigned tax period.
appliesWhen: When the business meets the current compulsory VAT registration rules; returns per assigned tax period thereafter.

name: Employer (PAYE) registration and remittance (ZIMRA)
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to businesses that become employers. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Businesses that become employers register for PAYE, remit monthly, and file the annual ITF 16 return.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer; monthly remittance and annual return thereafter.

name: NSSA employer registration and POBS contributions
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to employers of labour. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Employers of labour register with NSSA and remit Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme contributions monthly.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer of labour; monthly remittance thereafter.

name: Medicines premises licence (MCAZ)
notes: The Black Book record covers medicines premises and business types subject to MCAZ licensing; the precise premises classes and any professional-registration prerequisites must be confirmed with MCAZ. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Premises dealing in medicines — including retail pharmacies and wholesale dealers — are subject to MCAZ premises licensing.
appliesWhen: Before operating medicines premises subject to MCAZ licensing.

name: Harare health registration of premises
notes: Whether a specific health facility type appears on the council's form must be confirmed with City Health. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Business premises of the types listed on Harare's Health Registration application form require council health registration.
appliesWhen: When operating premises of a listed type in the City of Harare.

name: Bulawayo premises registration certificate
notes: Whether a specific health facility type is on the Inspectorate's list must be confirmed with the council. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Premises listed by the Bulawayo Health Inspectorate require an annually renewed registration certificate.
appliesWhen: When operating listed premises types in Bulawayo; certificate valid to 31 December.

name: ESIA certificate for facility projects (EMA)
notes: Whether a specific facility project is in an EMA-listed category must be confirmed against EMA's current prescribed list. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Construction or expansion projects in EMA-listed categories require an ESIA certificate before implementation.
appliesWhen: Before implementing a facility project in an EMA-listed category.

name: Central hospital referral directory (context)
notes: Recorded as context, not an obligation. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: The Ministry of Health publishes a directory of central hospitals used for referral context.
appliesWhen: Directory context for referrals; not an obligation on private providers.

name: Health facility licensing
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Licensing/registration of private hospitals, clinics and laboratories (health-facility regulator) is not yet evidenced by a Black Book record.

name: Professional practitioner registration councils
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Registration of doctors, dentists, pharmacists, nurses and allied professionals with their statutory councils is not yet evidenced by Black Book records.

name: Medical-aid society regulation and provider contracting
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Regulation of medical-aid funders and the provider claims/tariff framework is not yet evidenced by Black Book records; no tariff is asserted.

name: Medical waste handling obligations
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Specific EMA or council obligations for clinical/medical waste beyond general effluent licensing are not yet evidenced by Black Book records.

name: Controlled substances registers
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Controlled/dangerous drugs registers and related MCAZ or police obligations are not yet evidenced by Black Book records.
